name: PsyArbor W9 REBUS Calculations
blurb: Behavior-first W9 lab branch built from W8: ports five NumPy-only rebus-lab primitives (log-det-cov dispersion entropy, pinball-loss online quantile thresholds, Huber-clipped per-assembly error attribution, moving-block bootstrap CIs, pinball-loss kappa envelope) and wires four of them into the W8 supervisor while preserving the kill-switch parity contract.
notes: W9 layers principled-signal-estimation calculations from rebus-lab on top of W8's supervisor (mode FSM, sparse routing, health, clone-and-perturb). All ports are NumPy-only with no cvxpy import. Each new feature has a dedicated kill switch so users can ablate any subset back to W8 v1.1 behavior. Validation is pending for the integrated pipeline at the 16/64 budget.
